title: shorea malaanonan
intro: Shorea malaanonan, also known as Bagtason or Bagtason Tree, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which is rich in saponins and has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Shorea malaanonan include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and protect against infections. Shorea malaanonan is commonly used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and salves, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
